_publications._publicationTitle: Epigenomic, genomic, and transcriptomic landscape of schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: NF2 gene was the only recurrent driver somatic mutation in all SWNs with interestingly a statistically significant higher proportion of SWNTS-SWNs harboring mutations and copy number loss in NF2 compared to NS-SWNs (83% vs. 58%, Chi-square, p < 0.0001)
details: Successfully identified somatic mutations showing that NF2 gene was the only recurrent driver somatic mutation in all SWNs, with 83% of SWNTS-SWNs vs 58% of NS-SWNs harboring NF2 mutations
